pages.text: Chiseled bookshelves and lecterns now count towards the table's bookshelf power, based on how many books they hold.$(br2)$(#7A2FBF)3 books = 1 vanilla bookshelf.$()
There is also no longer a requirement to keep the space between shelf and table empty, and shelves can be placed anywhere in a $(#7A2FBF)7x4x7 area$() centered on the table (1 below, 2 above).

pages.title: Valid Positions
pages.text: Bookshelves packed around a table showing which positions count.
